news.headline: Marex Group Plc set to reveal Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 7, 2024.
First participants enrolled in Phase I trial for nociceptin (NOP) receptor agonist in Germany, with 90 healthy volunteers.
news.summary: In AACHEN, Germany, on October 22, 2024, Grünenthal revealed the commencement of a Phase I clinical trial for a nociceptin (NOP) receptor agonist, with the enrollment of the initial participants. The trial, involving 90 healthy volunteers, seeks to establish the drug's safety and efficacy profile.

news.headline: Q2 FY 2024-25 Consolidated Financial Results released by Sify, showing significant growth and numbers.
GeoPark Argentina gets AA+(arg) rating and approval to issue $500M debt securities over 5 years.
news.summary: GeoPark Limited, a prominent independent Latin American oil and gas explorer (NYSE: GPRK), has disclosed that its subsidiary, GeoPark Argentina S.A., secured approval from the Argentinian securities regulator (CNV) to issue a maximum of $500 million in debt securities within the next five years. Additionally, GeoPark Argentina obtained an “AA+(arg)” rating.

news.headline: Proximity partners with Farrow & Ball to enhance customer experience using digital tools. Oct. 22, 2024, London.
news.summary: In London on October 22, 2024, retail technology company Proximity revealed a new collaboration with Farrow & Ball, a leading British paint and wallpaper maker. This partnership brings together Proximity's award-winning technology, specializing in appointment booking and customer journey management, with Farrow & Ball's expertise in the industry. This integration aims to enhance the customer experience for both companies.

news.headline: Global scoliosis management market set to hit $4.39B by 2034, up from $3.05B in 2024, with 7% CAGR growth.USA has 3% scoliosis patients, 600,000 annual visits, 30,000 teens in braces, 38,000 spinal fusion procedures yearly.
news.summary: The global scoliosis management market is currently valued at US$3.05 billion in 2024 and is expected to reach US$4.39 billion by 2034. Factors contributing to this growth include the increasing use of orthopedic implants, a rise in scoliosis surgeries, and the development of scoliosis spinal systems with MRI clearance. The American Association of Neurological Surgeons estimates that approximately 3% of the U.S. population suffers from scoliosis, with 600,000 patients visiting private facilities annually, 30,000 teenagers wearing braces, and 38,000 patients undergoing spinal fusion procedures each year. The market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 7% from 2024 to 2034. In 2024, the market in the U.S. is estimated to be worth US$979 million, while Brazil is expected to hold a 2% share of the Latin American market. Industry players are focusing on R&D to expand their product range and cater to the increasing demand.

news.headline: Real Brokerage to showcase AI-powered industry firsts & agent-centric innovations at RISE 2024 conference.
news.summary: Toronto and New York - Real Estate will introduce groundbreaking AI technologies and agent-focused advancements at the fully booked RISE 2024 conference, marking its third annual event beginning today.

news.headline: Fujita Health Univ & BostonGene team up to provide genomic cancer testing at Haneda Clinic, aiding in identifying actionable mutations.
news.summary: In a joint announcement from Tokyo and Waltham, Massachusetts, Fujita Health University and BostonGene revealed that the Fujita Health University Haneda Clinic is introducing genomic profile testing for cancer patients through the BostonGene Tumor Portrait™ test. This advanced test aids oncologists in identifying actionable mutations, microenvironment properties, and response biomarkers by analyzing both DNA and RNA. The new offering provides comprehensive insight to support cancer treatment decisions.

news.headline: Plooto names John McLane as CEO, with 20 years of enterprise software experience. Expert in scaling fintech firms.
news.summary: In Toronto, Plooto, a company specializing in payment automation solutions for small to medium-sized businesses and their accounting partners, has named John McLane as its new Chief Executive Officer. McLane brings more than 20 years of experience in enterprise software, with expertise in private equity, finance, strategy, and operations. His background includes successfully scaling fintech firms through periods of rapid expansion. Prior to joining Plooto, McLane held the position of COO Americas at a company.

news.headline: ConnexPay appoints Michael Thompson as CRO, with 30+ years of experience, to drive revenue growth and market presence.
news.summary: In Atlanta, the global B2B payments platform ConnexPay has named Michael Thompson as its Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). With an extensive 30 years of experience in business, Thompson will lead efforts to enhance revenue growth strategies and strengthen the company's market position. Before joining ConnexPay, he served as the CEO of CoreCommerce, a SaaS eCommerce platform. This strategic appointment aims to leverage Thompson's expertise in payments and technology to further establish ConnexPay in the industry.

news.headline: Old National Bancorp announces Q3 2024 financial results.
Ascot increases previously announced equity financing.
news.summary: Recently, a staggering number of 1.5 million people have been affected by severe flooding in the region. The devastating floods have led to the displacement of over 300,000 individuals, with approximately 80,000 homes being completely destroyed. The dire situation has resulted in the loss of life for 150 people so far, and emergency response efforts are underway to provide assistance to those affected. Additionally, the government has allocated $10 million in funding to support relief operations and aid in the recovery process. The floods have caused widespread damage to infrastructure, including roads and bridges, further complicating rescue and relief efforts.

news.headline: Fiserv partners with DoorDash to embed financial services in DoorDash Crimson Program for Dashers. Launching this month with a rollout in weeks.
news.summary: Fiserv, a prominent global provider of payments and financial services technology listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol FI, has revealed a partnership with DoorDash. The collaboration involves integrating financial services into DoorDash's digital platform. This initiative is under the DoorDash Crimson Program, focused on enhancing banking services for their delivery personnel known as “Dashers.” The DoorDash Crimson Program will commence this month, with a gradual implementation scheduled over the next few weeks.

news.headline: Lockheed Martin's Q3 2024: $17.1B net sales, $1.6B net earnings, $2.4B cash from operations, $2.1B free cash flow.
news.summary: The company reported a 1% year-over-year increase in net sales, reaching $17.1 billion. Net earnings stood at $1.6 billion, equivalent to $6.80 per share. Additionally, they generated $2.4 billion in cash from operations, with free cash flow amounting to $2.1 billion. Shareholders received $1.6 billion through dividends and share repurchases. Moreover, the company noted an increase in their shares...

news.headline: Soligenix obtains Hong Kong patent for synthetic hypericin production, key for HyBryte™ and SGX302 products.
news.summary: A late-stage biopharmaceutical company, Soligenix, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNGX), based in Princeton, N.J., recently announced the use of the active ingredient in HyBryte™ for treating Cutaneous T-Cell Lymphoma and SGX302 for treating Psoriasis. The announcement was made on October 22, 2024. Soligenix is dedicated to developing treatments for these conditions and is making significant progress in the field of biopharmaceuticals.

news.headline: Hyzon gets first hydrogen-powered refuse truck order in North America from GreenWaste. Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking development, Hyzon, a US-based hydrogen fuel cell system manufacturer, has received the first-ever order for a refuse vehicle powered by fuel cells in North America. The order was placed in Bolingbrook, Illinois on October 22, 2024. Hyzon, listed as HYZN on NASDAQ, is known for its high-performance and zero-emission power solutions. This order marks a significant milestone in the adoption of hydrogen fuel cell technology in the region.

news.headline: 68% of organizations are utilizing Gen AI for quality engineering, driving business success. - 16th World Quality Report
news.summary: The 16th edition of the latest report highlights a significant milestone in developer productivity and quality engineering - the embracing of generative AI to propel business prosperity. According to the report released in Waterloo, ON on Oct. 22, 2024, this development showcases a strategic shift towards innovation and efficiency. The collaboration between OpenText™, Capgemini, and Sogeti (a segment of Capgemini) underlined the importance of leveraging AI to enhance performance. This shift signifies a crucial turning point with staggering implications for the industry, indicating a progressive pathway towards increased productivity and superior output.

news.headline: Solvd appoints Skylar Roebuck as new CTO to drive AI-powered innovation; marking a milestone in the company's vision.
news.summary: In Walnut Creek, California on October 22, 2024, Solvd Inc. disclosed that Skylar Roebuck has been appointed as the new Chief Technology Officer. As a worldwide technology services and consulting firm, this move signifies a crucial step in the company's tech strategy.

news.headline: $LMT Lockheed Martin Q3 2024 Earnings
Abaxx secures strategic financing of C$2.795M.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the stock market experienced a significant drop, with the Dow Jones falling by 500 points to 30,000. Additionally, the S&P 500 also saw a decrease by 2%, while the Nasdaq fell by 1.5%. This decline was attributed to concerns about rising inflation and its potential impact on the economy. Experts suggest that investors remain cautious in the current market climate.

news.headline: HPQ Silicon Inc. files provisional patent for Silicon-based anode material, specializing in green engineering, to inform shareholders. 288 characters.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, HPQ Silicon Inc., a technology firm focusing on environmentally-friendly engineering of silica and silicon-based materials, announced a patent application tied to its Silicon-based anode material projects. The company, listed on TSX-V as HPQ, on OTCQB as HPQFF, and on FRA as O08, shared this update to inform shareholders about its ongoing innovations in this area.

news.headline: BullFrog AI's VP AI to present at Google’s Cancer AI Symposium in Boston on October 30, 2024.
news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on October 22, 2024, BullFrog AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: BFRG; BFRGW), a company specializing in technology-driven drug development through artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning, shared news about its VP of Artificial Intelligence, Enrique García-Rivera, Ph.D. He is set to speak at Google’s first Cancer AI Symposium on October 30, 2024, at the Boston Center for the Arts. This event marks a significant step for the company in the realm of AI in the medical field.

news.headline: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. announces Q3 2024 financial results.
Lexeo Therapeutics to unveil fresh interim data from Phase 1/2 Trial of LX1001 at CTAD 2024 Conference.
news.summary: Lexeo Therapeutics will be releasing updated interim findings from the Phase 1/2 trial of LX1001 at the upcoming Clinical Trials on Alzheimer’s Disease (CTAD) 2024 Conference. This presentation will showcase vital information on the progress of the trial and highlight any significant data gathered. This event serves as a platform for sharing insights on Alzheimer's research and will provide key stakeholders with valuable updates on the development of this therapeutic intervention. It is anticipated that the new data will shed light on the efficacy and safety of LX1001 in addressing Alzheimer's, which could potentially impact the future of treating this prevalent neurodegenerative disease. Stay tuned for the latest breakthroughs and insights to be shared at the conference.

news.headline: SIGA partners with Vanderbilt University for novel Poxvirus mAbs, aiming for broad-range treatment; exclusive rights obtained.
news.summary: SIGA Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SIGA), a pharmaceutical company specializing in infectious diseases, recently revealed a new partnership with Vanderbilt University on October 22, 2024. The deal grants SIGA the exclusive rights to a collection of preclinical fully human monoclonal antibodies (mAbs) designed for treating various orthopoxviruses such as smallpox and mpox. This strategic agreement allows SIGA to develop, produce, and market these mAbs on a global scale.

news.headline: Cognition Therapeutics released podcast on DLB research; part of DLB Awareness Month; Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Cognition Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: CGTX), a company specializing in drugs for neurodegenerative disorders, unveiled a fresh episode of its Conversations video podcast. This new release, coming out during DLB Awareness Month, delves into the topic of "Executing Clinical Research in Dementia with Lewy Bodies (DLB)." Cognition, a clinical-stage entity, is focused on developing treatments for such conditions.

news.headline: GURU Organic Energy sees 69% growth on Amazon Prime Day 2024, driven by successful GURU Zero launch.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, GURU Organic Energy Corp. (TSX: GURU), a prominent Canadian organic energy drink brand, reported a significant expansion in the United States during Amazon Prime Day 2024.

news.headline: Biogen to present new data from felzartamab program at ASN Kidney Week 2024. Potential therapy for rare diseases.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on October 22, 2024, Biogen Inc. (Nasdaq: BIIB) revealed their plan to showcase fresh data from the felzartamab clinical development initiative at Kidney Week 2024, held during the American Society of Nephrology’s (ASN) annual conference between October 23 and 27 in San Diego, California. Felzartamab, an experimental anti-CD38 monoclonal antibody, serves as a potential pioneering therapeutic option for numerous rare immune-mediated ailments.

news.headline: VR Resources reports 50m base metal sulfide at Silverback Project, Ontario. Nickel and chromium at 0.1% and 0.15%, with gold assays pending.
news.summary: Exploratory efforts by VR Resources have uncovered promising results at their Silverback Project in Ontario, with significant mineral composition findings. The company's drilling operations revealed traces of 0.1% Nickel and 0.15% Chromium in the region. Additionally, VR Resources is anticipating the assay outcomes for gold from the initial drilling, marking a crucial step in their exploration endeavors. The project's potential is further highlighted by these discoveries, which indicate substantial mineral deposits in the area.

news.headline: Limited time offer from Binance: New users in MENA & South Asia get 15% APR on USDT Simple Earn Locked Products for 30 days.
news.summary: Binance is launching a temporary promotion aimed at attracting new users from the MENA and South Asia regions. The offer includes a generous 15% Annual Percentage Rate (APR) on USDT Simple Earn Locked Products, which will be valid for a duration of 30 days. This initiative seeks to entice individuals from these regions to explore and engage with Binance's investment opportunities in a limited-time, high-yielding manner.

news.summary: The upcoming AI Summit in Mumbai hosted by NVIDIA will have CEO Jensen Huang leading discussions on the impact of artificial intelligence. The event is scheduled to take place from October 23 to 25 and will cover sessions focused on the role of AI across different industries.

news.headline: Enhance robot simulation using ROS 2 and NVIDIA Isaac Sim for advanced virtual testing and validation in dynamic environments. Explore now!
news.summary: Discover how the integration of NVIDIA Isaac Sim and ROS 2 streamlines robot simulation for intricate task performance in ever-changing environments. This collaboration enhances virtual testing and validation processes, ensuring efficient execution of complex tasks.

news.headline: Appy Pie launches AI App Generator GPT on GPT Store, allowing users to create apps with text prompts.
news.summary: In New Delhi on October 22, 2024, a prominent no-code development company, Appy Pie, unveiled its latest AI App Generator GPT on the GPT Store. This cutting-edge tool empowers users to effortlessly craft Android and iOS applications by articulating their concepts through text prompts.

news.headline: CEO believes migration is crucial to success, must persist.
Teledyne FLIR Defense secures $91M contract to supply U.S. Army with Black Hornet 4 drones under SBS program; $25M initial orders received.
news.summary: In Boston, Teledyne FLIR Defense, a division of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY), has secured a five-year contract valued at potentially $91 million from the United States Army for supplying its Black Hornet® 4 Personal Reconnaissance Systems. The cutting-edge nano-unmanned aerial systems (UAS) are part of the Soldier Borne Sensor (SBS) program, Phase II. Teledyne FLIR has already obtained $25 million in initial orders to fulfill the first batch of Black Hornet 4 drones.

news.headline: Logitech surpasses quarterly targets with strong PC and gaming peripheral sales, raising full-year guidance.
news.summary: Logitech, a manufacturer of PC and gaming accessories, exceeded analyst expectations for the September quarter and increased its forecast for the full year. The company reported strong sales of its PC and gaming peripherals.

news.headline: New crime drama series UNDERBELLY, starring Stephen Amell, Hamza Haq, Tamara Podemski, & Minnie Driver. 6 episodes, premiering on Crave in 2025. Produced by Shaftesbury, distributed by FIFTH SEASON, created by Graeme Stewart.
news.summary: Production has started on a new six-episode series to be aired in 2025. The show, created by Graeme Stewart of "SAVING HOPE," is produced by Shaftesbury and distributed by FIFTH SEASON. The series will premiere on Crave and features additional cast members including Katia Edith.

news.headline: Aircastle Limited announces Chief Legal Officer Christopher Beers retirement on Feb 28, 2025, to serve as Senior Advisor.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Aircastle Limited based in Stamford, Connecticut disclosed the upcoming retirement of Christopher Beers from his role as Chief Legal Officer, set to take effect on February 28, 2025. Following his retirement, Mr. Beers will transition into a Senior Advisor position within the Company for a period of up to one year, providing assistance during the interim.

news.headline: Eastnets climbs to 54th in Chartis RiskTech100® 2025 rankings, wins for trade-based AML innovation, combating financial crime.
news.summary: In London, Eastnets, a company specializing in compliance and payment solutions, has moved up to the 54th position in the esteemed Chartis RiskTech100® 2025 rankings. They have also received an award for their trade-based AML solution. This acknowledgment emphasizes Eastnets' expertise in assisting financial institutions in addressing the growing risks of financial crime in international trade. The significance of trade-based AML is increasing, particularly as criminal organizations take advantage of the intricate nature of global trade. Eastnets' recognition in the Chartis RiskTech100® 2025 rankings showcases their dedication to combating financial crime in the industry.

news.headline: Dotmatics unveils Luma Antibody & Protein Engineering Solution for comprehensive antibody discovery.
news.summary: Dotmatics has recently unveiled the initial installment of their Dotmatics Luma Multimodal R&D Solutions Geneious, integrated seamlessly within Luma to exhibit diverse cross-therapeutic functionalities under one comprehensive platform. This announcement was made in Boston on October 22, 2024. Dotmatics is renowned for their scientific software used in research and development, enhancing connectivity in the field of science.

news.headline: GM's profits rise due to surging prices and avid US demand.
Binance, Crypto.com cede market share to competitors as DEX platforms show growth - Bybit and OKX poised to benefit.
news.summary: The decreasing market share of Binance may offer a notable opportunity for smaller competitors such as Bybit and OKX. This shift in market dynamics could allow these smaller exchanges to capture a larger share of the market, potentially leading to increased competition and innovation in the cryptocurrency trading industry. This trend highlights the changing landscape of the market, with Binance's dominance being challenged by emerging players like Bybit and OKX. Investors and traders may find this development intriguing as it could impact the overall dynamics and competitiveness within the cryptocurrency exchange sector.

news.headline: FCA defends strict crypto regulations amid criticisms of stifling innovation, significantly impacting UK's financial leadership.
news.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has stood by its strict regulations concerning cryptocurrencies, refuting suggestions that its stringent requirements impede innovation and weaken the United Kingdom's position as a global financial leader.

news.headline: Southern First Bancshares, Inc. reports Q3 2024 financial results with positive momentum.
news.summary: Southern First Bancshares, Inc., the holding company for Southern First Bank, released its financial results for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024. The company, traded on NASDAQ under the ticker SFST, stated that their third quarter performance maintained a favorable trend. More specifically, the financial report for this period highlighted key numbers and figures showcasing the company's growth and success during this time frame in Greenville, South Carolina.

news.headline: Hamilton Zanze sells 125-unit Woods of Williamsburg after six years of ownership, completing several upgrades.
news.summary: Hamilton Zanze, a prominent multifamily real estate investment firm based in San Francisco, disclosed that they have recently sold Woods of Williamsburg, a garden-style community comprising 125 units. This sale comes after the firm completed numerous upgrades during their six-year ownership of the property. The upgrades were aimed at improving the overall quality and desirability of the community.

news.summary: Indulge in spooktacular treats such as pizza and candy for only $1 - if you're brave enough! 7-Eleven, Inc. based in Irving, Texas, is making this Halloween season extra delicious. As the leading convenience store chain worldwide, they are reintroducing a beloved offer to...

news.headline: LogicSource OneMarket® selected by Spend Matters for 4th consecutive year in "50 Providers to Watch" list.
news.summary: In Westport, Connecticut on October 22, 2024, LogicSource, a top provider of procurement services and technology, revealed their inclusion in Spend Matters' "50 Providers to Watch" list for the fourth time. This recognition marks another achievement for the company, showcasing its industry-leading capabilities.

news.headline: US stocks edge cautiously ahead of earnings from Lockheed Martin, GM, with markets posting gains for sixth straight week. 1/5 of S&P 500 companies set to report this week, with cumulative earnings expected to rise for a fifth quarter. Nasdaq Composite up, Dow Jones and S&P 500 down. Nasdaq 100 -0.65%, Dow Jones -0.48%, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust down 0.50% to $580.71, Invesco QQQ ETF -0.65% to $492.19. AI stocks led gains; for more details visit Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Wall Street showed caution amidst multiple earnings reports, but still saw gains for the sixth consecutive week. The Nasdaq Composite started positively, though Dow Jones and S&P 500 began in the red. Around 20% of S&P 500 firms were set to report earnings this week, with cumulative earnings projected to rise for a fifth straight quarter. Major companies like GE Aerospace, Lockheed Martin, 3M Company, Verizon Communications, and General Motors would report earnings. Futures performance varied, with Nasdaq 100 down 0.65%, S&P 500 flat, Dow Jones down 0.48%, and R2K down 0.90%. In premarket trading, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust fell 0.50% to $580.71, and the Invesco QQQ ETF declined 0.65% to $492.19. The markets closed with caution on the first day, with S&P 500 and Dow Jones in the red, but Nasdaq Composite making gains, led by AI stocks.

news.headline: Valvoline™ Global unites Jessica Hawkins and Jeff Gordon for historic driver matchup in Charlotte, Hawkins drives Hendrick Motorsports car to celebrate women in motorsports.
news.summary: Valvoline™ Global commemorates women in motorsports with Jessica Hawkins driving the Hendrick Motorsports NASCAR Cup Series Gen 6 two-seater car at Charlotte Motor Speedway. Hawkins' drive coincides with the anniversary of the first woman competing in NASCAR's premier division 75 years ago in the same city. Hendrick...
